name: Young JV
description: '''Eduardo JV Arancillo Kapunan III''' (born July 23, 1990), known by his stage name '''Young JV''', is a Filipino hip-hop recording artist, actor, and basketball player. He became famous for his first single in 2009, "That Girl" which was composed by himself. He produced his first album, ''Ready or Not'' under [[PolyEast Records]] and Doin' It Big Production. He performs on the variety show ''[[ASAP (variety show)|ASAP]]'' and is a member of an all-male group, A-pop, which is composed of JV himself, [[Sam Concepcion]], Nel Gomez and Jaco Benin. He is a talent of [[ABS-CBN Corporation|ABS-CBN]]'s [[Star Magic]].
